# Austin Becker E-Commerce Marketing

> Austin Becker E-Commerce Marketing is a U.S.-based PPC agency that helps $5M–$50M annual revenue e-commerce stores grow through paid advertising on Google, Amazon, and Microsoft. The team specializes in product data feed optimization and ad campaign management for Shopify stores with large product catalogs (10,000+ SKUs).

The agency is led by founder Austin Becker. The agency is a Google Premier Partner and a Microsoft Advertising Partner. Notable clients include Hose Warehouse, Belt Smart, Parker Baby Co, Kingsley North, MyMusicFolders, TallSlim Tees, The Crypto Lawyers, Murdock Industrial, Conservation Mart, Iron Fence Shop, Maia Homes, Poulsbo RV, Indoor Cycle Pros, Billfodl, Meseroll, Irish Woodworks, and Listing Mirror.

Typical client outcomes: improved return on ad spend within 2–4 weeks of feed optimization, and increased total sales within 1–2 months. Past results include a 181.92% year-over-year revenue increase for Hose Warehouse and a 16% decrease in Google Ad spend with a 221% increase in form leads for Iron Fence Shop.

## Services

- [Google Shopping Ads](https://abeckermarketing.com/services/google-shopping-ads.html): Product listing ads with emphasis on product data optimization, inventory prioritization, and e-commerce reporting.
- [Google Search Ads](https://abeckermarketing.com/services/google-search-ads.html): Text search ads across the Google ad inventory to drive incremental e-commerce sales.
- [Google Display Network](https://abeckermarketing.com/services/google-display-network.html): Display advertising to keep stores top-of-mind through the purchase decision.
- [Amazon Ads](https://abeckermarketing.com/services/amazon-ads.html): Amazon advertising optimized around ad spend efficiency and ACOS targets aligned to business goals.
- [Microsoft Ads](https://abeckermarketing.com/services/microsoft-ads.html): Paid advertising on Bing, AOL, Yahoo, and DuckDuckGo via Microsoft Advertising.
- [Product Feeds](https://abeckermarketing.com/services/product-feeds.html): Product data feed creation and optimization so listings stand out across channels.
- [YouTube Ads](https://abeckermarketing.com/services/youtube-ads.html): YouTube video ad campaigns to drive consideration and purchase.
